comment: Aim-glide (cf. Warframe glide, Titanfall, AER): while airborne and DESCENDING, HOLD the `aim` input to enter a controlled float — gravity reduced and downward speed CAPPED to a slow glide, while you steer along the move/wish direction. INTENT-GATED (only while aim is held and you are falling), time-limited by a budget so it cannot float forever. PURE DATA: composed onto base.kit.json via kit overlay, no engine code change. Adds ONE new state GLIDE plus ONE entry transition into AIR (priority 45 — below wall-run 70 / vault 60 / wall-cling 75, above the land exit 10 — never collides). The descent is slowed by apply_gravity at a small scale clamped at min_vy (the hard glide fall cap); steering is the EXISTING air_strafe along the wish space; the budget is a wall-/glide timer. All conditions, effects, ordering and tuning are existing primitives; the only seam is the new state + transition (data). See docs/decisions/movement-substrate.md §2, §5 (named presets).
comment_vars: §B — glide is a decaying var (the glide time budget): set on entry, drains by dt, ends the float via var<=0.
comment_inputs: Declare the `aim` action so the interpreter samples it each tick (input_pressed reads the sampled frame). No buffer/hold — a plain held button.

AIR.comment: Enter GLIDE: airborne, holding aim, and DESCENDING (speed_v < 0) so it engages a controlled float on the way down — never cancels the rise of a fresh jump. Priority 45 (below wall-cling 75 / wall-run 70 / vault 60, above land 10). Arms the glide time budget.

transitions.comment: Coyote/buffered jump out of a glide (reuse the air-jump idiom): a buffered jump while gliding cancels the float into a normal jump. Highest priority.
aim RELEASED → resume normal fall (back to AIR).
Glide budget drained → resume normal fall.
Landed → GROUND (a buffered crouch/jump then fires on the landing frame via the base GROUND transitions).

tick.comment: Reduced gravity, with the downward speed HARD-CAPPED to glide_fall_cap (the slow controlled descent). apply_gravity scale glide_gravity_scale, min_vy glide_fall_cap.
Steer along the wish direction while gliding (controlled float), additive up to glide_strafe_cap — the existing air_strafe primitive.
